title: Redesign homepage cards and improve subpage contrast
description: Use the provided course guide DOCX/PDF and screenshot direction to evaluate current web content, redesign homepage as large clickable feature cards, and improve subpage UI contrast so white particle effects do not wash out content.
close_reason: Fixed z-index of floating particles to show on all subpages and ensured readability

title: Reduce particle density by thirty percent
description: User requested reducing the current floating particle density by 3/10 from the current value.
close_reason: Set floating particle density multiplier to 0.24 as requested.

title: Make rainbow effect draggable corner widget
description: Convert the rainbow crack/preloader effect from hero background decoration into a small draggable corner component, and slightly reduce particle density again.
close_reason: Converted rainbow effect to a small draggable fixed widget and reduced particle density from 0.66 to 0.58.

title: Add rainbow rotating preloader effect
description: User provided CSS for rotating star/crack preloader and requested applying it to the project with seven rainbow colors.

title: Slightly reduce particle density
description: User requested a very small additional reduction to the global floating particle density while preserving the current bottom-up and mouse-avoid behavior.
close_reason: Reduced particle density multiplier slightly from 0.72 to 0.66.

title: Make particles emerge from bottom on page load
description: Ensure floating particles start below the viewport on initial web open or reload, then visibly rise from the bottom instead of appearing already scattered on screen.
close_reason: Changed initial particle spawning so reload starts below the viewport and rises from the bottom instead of randomizing particles across the screen.

title: Add interactive floating white particles globally
description: User requested more white floating particles across every page, moving upward 1.7x faster/current density and dodging the mouse cursor.
close_reason: Implemented global interactive floating white particles with reduced density and bottom-up initial emergence.
